page_title: New Zealand — North & South in One Trip | Alpen Glow Tours and Travels
title: New Zealand — North & South in One Trip
overview_paragraphs: New Zealand's North and South Islands feel like two different countries — geothermal valleys and Maori culture in the north, fjords and glacier-carved peaks in the south. This itinerary covers both ends properly rather than cramming everything into one island, with the famously scenic drives given the time they deserve.
Best for travelers who want dramatic scenery and outdoor activity without an expedition-level itinerary.
